prompt: Design a portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and contact information.

hero.title: Portfolio turns showcase work into a sharper digital experience.
hero.subtitle: A modern design engine with flexible layouts, purposeful spacing, and sections tuned for modern teams.

sections.title: Portfolio can lean visual when the industry demands it
sections.subtitle: Restaurants, portfolios, and lifestyle brands benefit from image-forward sections with stronger composition.

items.title: Editorial crops
items.caption: Large media blocks create pace and focus.

items.title: Atmosphere-led storytelling
items.caption: Visual sections can lead before copy takes over.

items.title: Responsive asymmetry
items.caption: The layout collapses cleanly on smaller screens.

sections.title: Capabilities shaped for Portfolio
sections.subtitle: The engine can recompose this section without collapsing into the same card grid every time.

items.title: Adaptive layouts
items.description: Switch between split, bento, grid, and zigzag compositions based on intent.

items.title: Design tokens
items.description: Theme, spacing, and typography stay consistent even when the layout changes.

items.title: Section intelligence
items.description: Ordering responds to audience needs instead of repeating the same page skeleton.

items.title: Controlled randomness
items.description: Variation is seeded and constrained to preserve hierarchy and alignment.

items.title: Motion built in
items.description: Reveal and hover interactions add polish without becoming noisy.

items.title: Regeneration controls
items.description: Swap a weak hero or features block without disturbing the rest of the page.

sections.title: Teams use Portfolio to escape lookalike websites
sections.subtitle: The system varies structure and visual rhythm while preserving trust cues.

items.quote: Every page stopped looking like the last one, but the product still felt coherent.
items.name: Nina Patel

items.quote: We can regenerate a weak section in seconds instead of reworking the whole page.
items.name: Marcus Chen

items.quote: The generated layouts finally reflect the industry context instead of a generic startup template.
items.name: Elena Brooks

sections.title: Launch a sharper Portfolio experience
sections.subtitle: Shuffle the full design or surgically regenerate one section when the composition feels flat.
